impose.accepted_description: Processing started. You can track it below.
impose.checkingPlanAccessDescription: We are verifying whether this workspace can use imposition tools.
impose.deleteTemplateDescription: This action cannot be undone. The template will be permanently deleted.
impose.deleteTemplateTitle: Are you sure you want to delete the template?

errors.tooManyFiles: You can upload up to {{maxFiles}} files in a single imposition batch.
errors.totalBatchTooLarge: The selected files total {{selectedSize}} MB, but the batch limit is {{maxTotalSize}} MB.

impose.noTemplatesDescription: Save a template from the form to reuse imposition settings.
impose.planDisabledDescription: Imposition is available from the Starter plan. Upgrade the workspace plan to use browser imposition tools.
impose.planDisabledTitle: Imposition is not available on this plan
impose.savedTemplatesDescription: Load, inspect, or delete saved templates.

stickers.bleedHint: Printed artwork extends this far outside the requested sticker size.
stickers.cutOffsetHint: Positive values enlarge the cut line; negative values inset it.

cutLines.description: Choose the PDF paths that should be exported as plotter cut lines.
cutLines.empty: No stroked vector paths were found on this PDF page.
cutLines.selectedHint: {{count}} PDF object(s) will replace the generated cut shape.
cutLines.title: PDF Cut Lines
cutLines.toggle: Use object {{index}} as a cut line

stickers.dropzoneTitle: Drop sticker PDFs, images, or ready sheets here
stickers.emptyPreview: Add sticker sources to see the live layout preview.
stickers.emptySources: Add files to build the sticker listing.
stickers.mirrorBleedHint: Reflects the PDF trim edges into the bleed area during export.

errors.metadataFailed: Failed to read sticker source metadata.
errors.metadataSkippedLargeBatch: Automatic size/artwork preview is skipped when the selected files exceed {{maxFileSize}} MB per file or {{maxTotalSize}} MB in total. You can still enter the sticker dimensions manually and create the imposition.
errors.noFiles: Add at least one sticker source file.

manualCutMarks.description: Adds short edge marks for manual trimming between stickers or ready sheets.
manualCutMarks.title: Manual Cut Marks

opos.description: Optical registration marks read by the plotter before cutting.
opos.title: OPOS Marks (Summa D140)

stickers.previewHint: Preview keeps roll margins visible; exported files crop to the occupied cut area.
stickers.readySheetHint: Ready sheets keep the original sheet bounds for manual trimming.
stickers.settingsDescription: Set media width, packing rules, and sheet behavior before exporting.
stickers.sourcesDescription: Upload sticker files and fine-tune quantity, size, and cut behavior for each source.

spotColors.chokeBleedHint: Negative values choke; positive values bleed the exported spot mask.
spotColors.dropzoneTitle: Drop spot artwork files here or click to browse
spotColors.emptyPreview: Upload an image or PDF to author spot channels and preview separations.

errors.brushFailed: Failed to update the selected spot layer.
errors.exportFailed: Failed to export the spot color PDF.
errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate the white underbase.
errors.halftoneFailed: Failed to generate the halftone spot layer.
errors.metadataInvalid: The selected spot metadata file is invalid.
errors.metadataMismatch: The selected spot metadata file does not match this artwork.
errors.noSelectedLayer: Select a spot layer before generating halftone.
errors.readFailed: Failed to read the selected artwork.
errors.title: Spot Preview Error

spotColors.noLayers: Upload artwork to initialize spot layers.
spotColors.noSpotChannels: Select at least one spot channel to include this layer in the exported PDF.

impose.title: Imposition

warnings.aiBleedFallbackFailed: AI bleed could not preprocess this imposition batch. {{reason}} The existing differential-diffusion fallback was used instead.
warnings.aiBleedFallbackVertexConfigIncomplete: AI bleed is unavailable because the server Vertex AI configuration is incomplete. The existing differential-diffusion fallback was used instead.
warnings.aiBleedMissingItemDimensions: AI bleed requires valid item dimensions in the imposition request. The existing differential-diffusion fallback was used instead.
warnings.aiBleedReducedWorkingResolution: AI bleed for {{filename}} used a reduced working resolution to fit the model input limits; the original artwork was still preserved in the center.
warnings.aiBleedUnsupportedBatchFileType: AI bleed currently supports only image uploads for the whole batch. {{filename}} could not be processed, so the existing differential-diffusion fallback was used instead.
warnings.sourcePdfBoxMismatch: {{filename}} declares page boxes that don't match its artwork (often from Canva exports), which can shift or clip the result. Konfi re-centered the artwork automatically, but please double-check this file's output.
warnings.title: Imposition warnings

workspace.actionsDescription: Keep templates and setup close while the sheet stays central.
workspace.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop print files here or click to browse
workspace.layoutToolbarHint: Use the edge controls in the preview to change the counts directly on the sheet.

modeDescriptions.bleedSizing: Define bleed handling, crop marks, and how the source should fit the requested output.
modeDescriptions.finishing: Control duplex behavior, back-side transforms, and finishing-related alignment.
modeDescriptions.layout: Change the layout type and use the sheet edges to set how many items fit across and down.
modeDescriptions.spacing: Click a gap in the preview to edit spacing. Changing one gap updates the whole axis by default.

previewHints.bleedSizing: Check the live sheet response while you tune bleed and source sizing.
previewHints.finishing: Switch between front and back here while you adjust duplex handling.
previewHints.layout: Use the edge controls to change how many items fit across and down.
previewHints.spacing: Click a gap badge to edit the whole axis spacing from the preview.

workspace.settingsDescription: Use the cog for sheet presets, item sizing, and booklet-specific setup.
workspace.sourcesDescription: Upload the files for this batch, then tune the layout directly on the sheet.
workspace.spacingEditorAxisHint: This edit updates the whole {{axis}} axis.
workspace.spacingToolbarHint: Click a gutter badge in the preview. One edit updates the whole axis by default.
